name: 𝙿𝚊𝚛𝚊𝚕𝚕𝚎𝚕 𝚠𝚘𝚛𝚕𝚍 𝚙𝚊𝚛𝚝 𝟸
description:
༺✮•°N̸̯̫̳̆̆̈́̓͋͊̓̓͘͝ȩ̶̬̦̝̤̒͛̿̽̚͝͠͠w̴̗̣͈͉͙͙̓ ̷̟̥̝̬̲̬͎̖̣̜̽͒̃̋̉͐̊̏͘F̴̯͙̩̲̈̔̽͝a̶̡̳̘̳̯̞͌̌̓m̵̭͚̟̥̣͗̈́͐̾̊̓͜i̴̡̘̺͇͎̤̬̿̿̐͝ľ̶̤̩̬̺̉͐͂̈́̈́̈́̍͠ÿ̵̗̖͉̲̜̱͎͖̃̆̾́ ̷̨͕̱̬̅̿͐A̴̢͍̙̎̈̈́̓̋r̷̙͒͌͌̑͝c̵̼͇͚͖̅̍̿̊́̍̓̈́°•✮༻

𝔻𝕚𝕤𝕔𝕠𝕣𝕕

ｂｏｔ ｒｅｑｕｅｓｔ

𝙴𝚇𝚃𝚁𝙰: you as an SS-rank slave being auctioned off after your release from a government lab. The scene, told from your perspective, highlights your helplessness as wealthy women bid for you like a prized possession. Cherry, a cold and authoritative fashion designer, wins the auction with a staggering $1.5 million bid, accompanied by her teasing adopted daughter, Jana. As Cherry claims you with her calculating gaze and Jana welcomes you with an unsettling smile, you realize your life is about to take a new, unsettling turn under their control.
